2346870.name: The Big Lez Video Game
2346870.description:
This is the official Big Lez Video Game, a 3rd and 1st person shooter with the original Big Lez Show locations and characters.

The current playable game modes are: deathmatch, battle royale, free roam and infected (campaign and other game modes will also be coming in the future).

You can play as Big Lez, Mike Nolan, Donny, Sassy, Clarence, Warning Guy, King Laranox and even a choomah! Every character has two specific special abilities that can be used during combat (such as Mike Nolans super exhale or Lez's stealth mode), use these to get the upper hand against other players. This game also features a variety of guns and the possibility to create your own preferred loadout.

Lastly the game features plenty of easter eggs from the show, so keep an eye out and see what you can find!
2346870.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
